home.group_job_description: Start a new job and invite others to work together
home.groups_description: Join existing groups and work as a team
home.job_header_descriptions: Looking for a stable, rewarding job? Join Los Santos Mining Company! As a miner, you'll play a crucial role in extracting valuable resources from the earth. Enjoy competitive pay, excellent benefits, and the satisfaction of working with heavy machinery every day. Work with a dedicated team, operate mining equipment, and experience the rugged terrain around Los Santos while making a difference. No prior experience required; we provide all necessary training.

competitive_pay.title: Competitive Pay
